components.role: Primary site navigation shell. Renders site identity, primary navigation, and commercial CTA when route-permitted.
accessibility_requirements: Must include skip-to-main-content link
Navigation must be wrapped in <nav> with aria-label
Site identity link must have descriptive text
All nav links must be keyboard-reachable
prohibited_behavior: Hardcoded navigation links outside data/navigation.json
Commercial CTA on routes where monetization_allowed is false
Sticky header with heavy animation
Any third-party tracking script in header

components.role: Footer navigation and compliance surface. Renders footer links, legal text, and domain attribution.
accessibility_requirements: Footer links must be keyboard-reachable
Footer must use semantic <footer> element
Link text must be descriptive, not 'click here'
prohibited_behavior: Sales language in footer
Affiliate links
Tracking pixels
Hardcoded links outside navigation.json

components.role: Governance transparency panel. Displays route role, UX layer, claim level, monetization status, and publication state. Hidden by default in production.
accessibility_requirements: Must use hidden attribute by default
When visible, must be keyboard-accessible
Content must be readable without color
prohibited_behavior: Visible in production without operator authorization
Displaying unpublished route data to public users
Styling that mimics primary content

components.role: Control map representation of the seven-layer Search-to-Action Journey. Makes the SXO framework visible as a navigable diagnostic interface element.
accessibility_requirements: Must use semantic list markup (<ol> or <ul>)
Each layer must be readable as plain text without CSS
Layer labels must not rely on color alone for identification
Interactive elements must be keyboard-reachable
prohibited_behavior: Canvas-only rendering
SVG-only rendering without text fallback
Animation required to read layer content
JavaScript required to render list

components.role: Reusable surface container for content sections. Applies diagnostic depth tokens and panel border system.
accessibility_requirements: Must not use role=presentation unless truly decorative
Background color must maintain contrast with contained text
No color-only distinction between panel types
prohibited_behavior: Heavy drop shadow that obscures content
Glow effects as the sole differentiator of panel type
Animated panel entry that delays content reading

components.role: Structured assessment grid for diagnostic and scoring surfaces. Used on SXO Score (action layer) and SXO Audit (action layer) routes.
accessibility_requirements: Grid must be readable as a table or list without CSS grid
Score cells must provide text values, not only visual indicators
Color-coded scores must include text labels
Must support keyboard navigation through grid cells
prohibited_behavior: Grid that becomes unreadable without JavaScript
Score values conveyed only through color
Fake score animations on load
Gamification patterns (badges, confetti, streaks)

components.role: Surface layer for established authority signals in the trust journey layer. Renders evidence markers, verified claims, and trust indicators using trust-color tokens.
accessibility_requirements: Trust indicators must include text, not only color or icon
Evidence citations must be readable without hover states
Contrast must meet WCAG AA on trust-color surfaces
prohibited_behavior: Fake trust signals (fabricated statistics, invented endorsements)
Trust color used on non-trust surfaces
Trust plane on commercial routes without evidential basis

components.role: Directional visual connector linking journey layers or content sections. Uses signal-color tokens to indicate intent-to-action progression flow.
accessibility_requirements: Path connectors must not be the sole indicator of sequence — numbered or labeled sequence must also exist
Decorative SVG connectors must have aria-hidden
Color-based paths must have text equivalent
prohibited_behavior: JavaScript-animated paths as primary navigation
Canvas-rendered paths without SVG fallback
Signal-color used outside signal-path context

components.role: Governed action route block in the action journey layer. Renders only CTAs explicitly permitted by the route's allowed_cta field.
accessibility_requirements: CTA must be a semantic <a> or <button> element
CTA text must be descriptive (not 'click here', 'learn more')
Focus state must be visually distinct
Must not auto-trigger or require hover to appear
prohibited_behavior: Commercial CTA on routes where monetization_allowed is false
Fake urgency text (limited time, only X spots remaining)
CTA not listed in route's allowed_cta
Action-color used outside CTA context

components.role: Internal navigation cluster linking to related registered routes. Supports journey progression and decision-path governance across the search-to-action layers.
accessibility_requirements: Links must be semantic <a> elements
Cluster must be wrapped in <nav> with aria-label
Link text must describe the destination
Must function without CSS or JavaScript
prohibited_behavior: Links to routes not registered in data/routes.json
Links to external domains without operator authorization
JavaScript-only link rendering
Decorative card styling that obscures link purpose

components.role: Sticky glass-surface command interface header for the search experience control system. Contains authority-node (site identity at the intent entry point), route-cluster (primary nav as decision path), and action-node-cluster (governed CTAs as action routes). Uses backdrop-filter blur on --surface-signal-field for interface depth without canvas or SVG.
accessibility_requirements: Must be the first element containing the skip-to-main-content link
authority-node link must have aria-label describing destination
route-cluster must be a <nav> element with aria-label='Primary navigation'
action-node-cluster must be a <nav> element with aria-label='Primary actions'
All links must be keyboard-reachable in logical tab order
backdrop-filter fallback: opaque --surface-command background for unsupported browsers
prohibited_behavior: JavaScript required for header layout or visibility
External font or script loaded in header
Animation that blocks header links from being clicked
Commercial CTA on routes where monetization_allowed is false
Hardcoded navigation links outside data/navigation.json
Space, orbit, or cosmic visual metaphors in header styling

components.role: Primary navigation link cluster rendered inside the command_header. Represents the decision path layer — the user's governed route through the search experience control system. Derives all links from data/navigation.json primary_nav array.
accessibility_requirements: Must use <ul> with role='list' to normalize list markers across browsers
Each link must use <a> with descriptive text
Must support flex-wrap at 768px breakpoint so all links remain visible on mobile
No link may target a deferred or unpublished route
prohibited_behavior: Hardcoded links not in navigation.json
Links to /seo-vs-sxo/, /ai-search-experience/, or /acquisition/ before those routes are published
Dropdown menus requiring JavaScript
Links hidden behind hover state only

components.role: Governed action route cluster inside the command_header. Renders action nodes as governed CTAs in the action journey layer. Gated by route monetization_allowed field and route allowed_cta list.
accessibility_requirements: Action nodes must be <a> elements with descriptive text
Must not auto-trigger or be hidden behind hover
Focus ring must meet WCAG 2.4.11 minimum target size
Must be skippable via skip-to-content link
prohibited_behavior: CTA rendered on routes where monetization_allowed is false
Urgency language in action node text
Payment links, affiliate links, or external ad scripts
JavaScript required to render or reveal action nodes

components.role: Layered control map rendering the seven-layer Search-to-Action Journey as a governed diagnostic surface. Maps the experience layer of the journey — making intent, visibility, experience, trust, navigation, action, and outcome visible as a structured control interface element. Embedded as static HTML in page.html.
accessibility_requirements: Layer index numbers must be visible text elements, not CSS counters alone
Signal indicators must be aria-hidden
Each layer must be readable as a plain list item without CSS grid
Ambient glow (::after) must not obscure layer text
Must not animate without prefers-reduced-motion guard
prohibited_behavior: JavaScript required to render layer list
Canvas or SVG as the primary layer rendering surface
Layers that are invisible without CSS grid support
Layer content that changes based on user identity or session
Orbital, planetary, or cosmic metaphors in component naming or styling

components.role: Governed content surface container wrapping injected page body HTML. Represents the experience layer of the journey — the quality of interaction after arrival. Applies --surface-command background, 2px --grid-line-strong left border, and --radius-control.
accessibility_requirements: Must maintain WCAG AA contrast between --surface-command and contained text
Left border is decorative — must not be sole indicator of content type
Content must be readable without the container background
prohibited_behavior: Inline styles on content-deck or child .page-section elements
Hardcoded color values outside token system
JavaScript required to populate or reveal content
External scripts or iframes embedded in content

components.role: Full page layout command surface that orchestrates all diagnostic zones: route-context-zone (visibility layer), page-signal-header (intent channel), content-deck (experience layer), journey-control-map-zone (journey visualization), related-routes-panel (navigation layer), governed-cta-zone (action layer).
accessibility_requirements: Must contain a single <h1> per page in page-signal-header
Must have id='main-content' on the containing <main> element for skip-link target
Reading order must follow visual order (no CSS reordering that breaks logical tab sequence)
prohibited_behavior: Multiple <h1> elements per page
CSS order property used to invert visual and DOM order
JavaScript layout calculation required for grid structure
Inline layout styles overriding governed grid

components.role: Governance transparency aside panel displaying route role, UX layer, claim level, monetization status, and publication status as a <dl> definition list. Represents the visibility layer of governance — making the route's strategic intent and status legible to operators. Hidden by default via HTML hidden attribute.
accessibility_requirements: Must use HTML hidden attribute for default hidden state (not CSS display:none alone)
Must use <aside> with aria-label='Route telemetry'
When made visible, must not disrupt primary content reading order
Definition list must use <dt>/<dd> pairs for each governance field
prohibited_behavior: Visible to public users without operator authorization
Displaying data from unpublished or deferred routes
JavaScript toggle required to hide/show panel
Styling that makes panel resemble primary page content
